CustomField.inlineHelpText: What area(s) are you most concerned with when speaking up about climate change?
CustomField.label: What area(s) are you most concerned with

value.fullName: A lack of understanding of the science (what is climate change, the negative impacts, etc...)
value.label: A lack of understanding of the science (what is climate change, the negative impacts, etc...)

value.fullName: Lack of understanding of the solutions (solar, wind, etc...)
value.label: Lack of understanding of the solutions (solar, wind, etc...)

value.fullName: Lack of understanding on how policy influences solutions
value.label: Lack of understanding on how policy influences solutions

value.fullName: Lack of understanding on policy process (i.e. how bills become laws, which lawmakers have decision making power, etc...)
value.label: Lack of understanding on policy process (i.e. how bills become laws, which lawmakers have decision making power, etc...)

value.fullName: Lack of understanding on how to lobby
value.label: Lack of understanding on how to lobby

value.fullName: Fear of questions from followers and fans you may not know the answers to
value.label: Fear of questions from followers and fans you may not know the answers to

value.fullName: Hesitation speaking up on your social media
value.label: Hesitation speaking up on your social media

value.fullName: Don't know where to start or how to help
value.label: Don't know where to start or how to help
